topics.title: Chess Addiction and Media Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses the complexities of chess as a mental obsession, the hypocrisy of media figures commenting on Don Imus's firing, and a humorous exchange regarding a racing competition.

topics.title: Racing Experiences and Radio Industry Conflicts
topics.summary: The studio explores a listener's racing progress, the public image of American Idol contestant Sanjaya, and the firing of a local radio host over controversial remarks.

topics.title: Campus Security and Shooting Tragedy
topics.summary: The studio discusses the recent shooting at Virginia Tech, the actions of the gunman, and potential security measures like metal detectors for school campuses.

topics.title: School Security and American Idol Discussion
topics.summary: The studio explores the efficacy of metal detectors in schools, the pressures facing young adults, and the upcoming results of American Idol's country week.

topics.title: Japanese Prison Experiences and Media Appearances
topics.summary: The show features a guest recounting his experience in a strict Japanese prison, followed by a discussion on the "Vote for the Worst" website's influence on American Idol and an upcoming appearance on late-night television.

topics.title: Sanjaya Fan Movement and Adult Content
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding the "VoteForTheWorse" website supporting Sanjaya Malacara on American Idol followed by a segment involving adult film inquiries.

topics.title: Star Trek Convention Interviews
topics.summary: The show features a series of interviews with minor cast members from the original Star Trek series who discuss their roles, the reality of being a bit player at conventions, and the logistics of celebrity appearances.

topics.title: Convention Experiences and Celebrity Interactions
topics.summary: The show features a discussion regarding fan interactions with horror icons, the logistics of celebrity appearances, and personal anecdotes involving members of the Whack Pack.

topics.title: Adult Film Industry Experiences
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion with adult film star Nick Manning regarding his career path from modeling to the porn industry and his experiences working with various performers.

topics.title: Nick Manning Interview
topics.summary: The studio features porn star Nick Manning as he discusses his career, specific catchphrases, and experiences on film sets.

topics.title: Porn Industry Insights and Racial Commentary
topics.summary: The show features an interview with a porn star regarding the business's logistics, followed by a segment involving racially charged language and a transition to news updates on American Idol and Sirius satellite radio.

topics.title: Media Gossip and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including upcoming segments for the wrap-up show, discussions regarding American Idol contestant Sanjaya, reports on celebrity relationships and health issues, and reactions to media reviews.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Virginia Tech Shooting
topics.summary: The studio discusses celebrity rumors involving Hulk Hogan and Marilyn Manson, upcoming film projects for adult film stars, and reports on the identification of the shooter in the Virginia Tech massacre.

topics.title: Virginia Tech Shooting Coverage
topics.summary: The show covers the aftermath of a deadly shooting at Virginia Tech, including reactions from local officials and discussions on media violence.
